name: B Cell Activation and Antibody Production
description: B-cell activation: antigen-engaged B cells either get T-cell help and enter germinal centers for affinity maturation and class switching, or mount a rapid T-independent IgM response, producing antibody-secreting plasma cells.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Antigen binds BCR"]
    N2{"T-dependent antigen?"}
    N3["Present Ag on MHC II to Tfh"]
    N4["CD40L + cytokine help"]
    N5["Germinal center proliferation"]
    N6["Somatic hypermutation"]
    N7{"High BCR affinity?"}
    N8["Class switch recombination"]
    N9["Plasma + memory B cells"]
    N10["Secreted antibodies"]
    N11["T-independent plasmablast"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 -->|yes| N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 -->|low: recycle| N5
    N7 -->|high| N8
    N8 --> N9
    N9 --> N10
    N2 -->|no| N11
    N11 --> N10

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N10 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    style N11 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff

nodeDetails.label: Present Ag on MHC II to Tfh
nodeDetails.detail: B cell presents antigen to follicular helper T cells

nodeDetails.label: CD40L + cytokine help
nodeDetails.detail: Tfh deliver CD40L and cytokine co-stimulation

nodeDetails.label: Germinal center proliferation
nodeDetails.detail: Clonal expansion in the germinal center

nodeDetails.label: Plasma + memory B cells
nodeDetails.detail: Differentiation into effector and memory cells
